strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, data, and infrastructure domains
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing active engagement with agentic tooling
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective founding and community-building through workshops and conference talks
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or ML; holds two unrelated bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts/Design)
AI involvement is shallow and very recent — scoped to developer tooling and infrastructure, not strategic AI product ownership or leadership
Career title ceiling is Staff/Senior Developer with no evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org influence at scale
response.justification: While the candidate brings genuine breadth across two decades of software engineering and some current exposure to agentic workflows, the role requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products built at scale, director-level strategic influence, and the ability to advise enterprise customers — none of which are evidenced in this resume. The recent AI work is limited to tooling support rather than strategy or product leadership, and the candidate has never operated above a Staff/Senior individual contributor level.
